feature_idea: a new feature for our service orchestration product which allows clients to direct transactions to different processor MIDs from the same Visa Acceptance Platform merchant account

press-release.critic_feedback: All five dimensions passed: specific customer persona (enterprise payments leaders at large international merchants/airlines), concrete problem evidence (bespoke routing engines, duplicated integrations, fragmented reporting), specific customer benefits (unified VAP account, consolidated reconciliation, no internal engineering dependency), strong spokesperson quote with genuine product insight, believable customer quote explicitly marked as placeholder.
